channel.title: f1sh.v.recipes blog
channel.description: Thoughts on code, tools, and random stuff.

item.title: linux as a daily driver in 2026
item.description: it finally feels like "the year of linux desktop" stopped being a joke.

item.title: git beyond the basics
item.description: the commands that separate "i use git" from "i understand git."

item.title: building this site: a deep dive
item.description: how a terminal aesthetic, vue 3, and too many late nights became f1sh.dev.

item.title: bypassing dpi with zapret on linux
item.description: step by step zapret installation to bypass isp deep packet inspection.

item.title: 2025 reflections and 2026 goals
item.description: what i learned, what i built, and what i am aiming for this year.

item.title: coding with llms for a year
item.description: what got faster, what stayed the same, and what got harder.

item.title: my terminal setup 2025
item.description: alacritty, zsh, tmux, and the small configs that make it work.

item.title: rust for js developers
item.description: the mental shift from garbage collection to ownership.

item.title: building a heatmap for github contributions
item.description: recreating the github contribution graph from scratch for my personal website.

item.title: the case for smaller containers
item.description: building images under 50mb instead of gigabytes and why it matters.

item.title: last.fm is still goated
item.description: why i still use last.fm in 2025 and how i added it to my site.

item.title: managing dotfiles with chezmoi
item.description: finally a dotfiles manager that does not feel like a second job.

item.title: why i switched from neovim to zed
item.description: giving up 5 years of modal editing for a mouse-friendly rust-based editor.

item.title: how i sync obsidian notes into vue
item.description: wiring a tiny pipeline that turns my messy vault into clean blog-ready markdown.

item.title: shipping tiny cli tools on a weekend
item.description: notes on building opinionated little binaries fast and keeping scope under control.

item.title: designing a terminal aesthetic without going full retro
item.description: balancing nostalgia and usability while building the new theme for this site.

item.title: ai browsers are just chromium
item.description: stop shipping chromium with a chatbot sidebar and calling it revolutionary. please.

item.title: welcome to my blog
item.description: first post on this new blog. thoughts on why i'm writing and what to expect.
